title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at BankBazaar Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at BankBazaar Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About BankBazaar Advisory Limited:
BankBazaar Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar Advisory Limited!
